{{Infobox character
| name = Ziel of the Wasteland
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
| name = Ziel of the Wasteland
| aliases = Ziel of the Wastelands, Ziel
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Ziel of the Wasteland, chosen of the Wastelands, former genius of the Iceflower continent, Underlord, Uncrowned of the Uncrowned King tournament, chosen of Northstridererator of the Dawnwing Sect (former/Archlord of the Dawnwing Sect)
| abilities = Enforcer technique, Forging technique, Path of the Dawn Oath, Soulsmith, scriptor, Thousand-Mile Cloud, Pure Storm Baptism, Stone Anchor, Steel Dragon’s Mountain technique, Oathsign technique
| affiliations = Dawnwing Sect, Kazan clan, Northstrider, House Arelius, Reaper Division, Sect of Twin Stars
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Ziel of the Wasteland Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel is a horned individual from the [[Wasteland]] known for his reputation as a calculated opportunist who waits for advantageous moments to strike. He is associated with the [[Wasteland]], an area that serves as a buffer between [[Akura]] territory and [[dragon]] lands, and he is rumored to be under the protection of the [[Beast King]]. Ziel utilizes a hammer in combat and follows the [[Path of the Wasteland]], which involves techniques related to wind and earth that can manipulate sand. His history is marked by significant hardship; he has suffered severe damage to his spirit, which makes using [[sacred arts]] difficult and causes him intense physical pain. This spiritual injury has impacted his power levels, leading to speculation that he was once a much higher-ranking practitioner. Despite these struggles and a perceived loss of ambition following a defeat by the [[Sage of Calling Storms]], he has demonstrated moments of renewed determination. He has been involved in various missions, including navigating the [[Ghostwater]] pocket world and exploring ruins like [[Shatterspine Castle]] to search for specific [[scripts]] or knowledge.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel of the [[Wasteland]] is a horned man who departed [[Ghostwater]] and is known for waiting on the sidelines to find an advantage. While under the protection of the [[Beast King]], his body became ravaged by a toxic, venomous green energy. This man possesses emerald horns and a long white beard, and he is recognized as an expert in revising [[Foundation]] theory. In combat, he utilizes a hammer, employing an [[Enforcer technique]] to manage the weapon's significant weight.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel is a horned boy from the [[Wasteland]] known to wait on the sidelines for an advantage.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ziel of the Wasteland]] is a person who departed [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel is known as [[Ziel of the Wasteland]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel is under the [[Beast King]]'s protection.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel is of the [[Wasteland]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel's body is ravaged by a venomous, toxic green energy.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel has green horns.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel has a long, white beard.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel is an expert in revising [[Foundation]] theory.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel is a man with emerald horns.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel uses a hammer.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Ziel uses an [[Enforcer technique]] to handle his hammer's weight.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Ziel spoke of pills that could advance a person to the peak of [[Truegold]] in minutes.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Once a celebrated genius of the [[Iceflower]] continent, Ziel was previously recognized as a [[Truegold]]. During the last [[Uncrowned King]] tournament, he competed as an [[Underlord]] before being mutilated by the leader of the [[Stormcaller cult]]. This encounter left his body ravaged by poison and his spirit damaged, leaving him a haggard man in a tattered gray cloak with green horns. Though [[Lindon]] suspects he may have once reached the rank of Overlord or [[Archlord]], Ziel is now known as a chosen of the Wastelands.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Ziel is a young-looking but haggard man in a tattered gray cloak with green horns.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Ziel was previously considered a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Ziel's spirit is damaged.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] suspects Ziel was once at least an Overlord or an [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Ziel is a former genius of the [[Iceflower]] continent.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Ziel was mutilated by the leader of the [[Stormcaller cult]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Ziel was an [[Underlord]] in the last [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Ziel's body was ravaged by poison.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Ziel is a chosen of the Wastelands.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A member of the [[Dawnwing Sect]] and a chosen of [[Northstrider]], Ziel is a [[Soulsmith]] and skilled scriptor who practices a variation of the [[Path of the Dawn Oath]]. Representing [[Northstrider]] in the [[Uncrowned]] tournament, this combatant wears a gray cloak and carries a massive two-handed warhammer alongside faintly glowing green horns. During the matches, Ziel utilizes the [[Enforcer]] and [[Forging]] techniques to create circles, displaying a spiritual pressure that resembles a [[Truegold]] despite being an [[Underlord]]. Although [[Eithan]] is able to funnel advancement resources to the fighter, Ziel eventually faces elimination from the tournament. This participant, who holds a lifelong oath to [[House Arelius]] and had previously given up on himself, remains a mystery following a past rampage against [[Brother Aekin]] caused by spiritual injury.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel is a member of the [[Dawnwing Sect]] and a chosen of [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel is an opponent in the tournament who wears a gray cloak and carries a massive two-handed warhammer.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel has short green horns that glow faintly.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel practices a variation of the [[Path of the Dawn Oath]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel is a [[Soulsmith]] and skilled scriptor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel's spiritual pressure is more like a [[Truegold]] than an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel represents [[Northstrider]] in the [[Uncrowned]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel stands in front of [[Northstrider]]'s audience.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel would receive a [[Broken Crown]] the red of [[blood madra]] as [[Northstrider]]'s representative.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] can funnel advancement resources to Ziel.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel had given up on himself.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel is a combatant in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel uses the [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel uses the [[Forging]] technique to create circles.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel has an oath to [[House Arelius]] for life.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel was eliminated from the matches.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Ziel is a mystery and once had a brief rampage against [[Brother Aekin]] before succumbing to spiritual injury.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A former [[Archlord]] and leader of the [[Dawnwing Sect]], Ziel possesses a cloud fortress situated adjacent to [[Lindon]]'s. After being recruited by [[Eithan]], Ziel linked his fortress to [[Lindon]]'s while questioning if [[Remnants]] form in the Valley. Although he is an [[Uncrowned]] of the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament and a chosen of [[Northstrider]], his spirit is currently restricted, reducing his strength to that of a [[Jade]]. While representing the [[Akura clan]] and the [[Sage of Twin Stars]], he was assigned to the [[Kazan clan]] and traveled to the base of [[Mount Samara]] with them. Following a period of unnatural focus that left him feeling fear, Ziel used a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to travel south and began recovering from spiritual wounds through a [[Pure Storm Baptism]] performed by [[Eithan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel owns a cloud fortress next to [[Lindon]]'s.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel stood next to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is a character who can fall asleep instantly by a pond.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel was recruited by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel linked his cloud fortress to [[Lindon]]'s as they approached.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is a character who questions if [[Remnants]] form in the Valley.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is a former [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel pushed over a tree with one hand.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel shook his head in response to [[Eithan]]'s declaration.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is the only one whose power [[Lindon]] did not borrow.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel believes anywhere is better than here.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel was assigned to the [[Kazan clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is a chosen of [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is an [[Uncrowned]] of the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is the former leader of the [[Dawnwing Sect]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel represents the [[Akura clan]] and the [[Sage of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel's spirit is currently restricted.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel's strength is currently reduced to that of a [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is a character who mentions that a [[Dreadgod]] can eat entire mountains.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is visiting other clans in person to assist with the evacuation.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is too far away to escape in time.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel may have brought the [[Kazan clan]] members to the area.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is unsure of Ziel's status.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is a person [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] have been looking for.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel reached the base of [[Mount Samara]] with the [[Kazan clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is a character who felt fear after a state of unnatural focus passed.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel was not present on the cloudship.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel used a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to travel south.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Ziel is recovering from spiritual wounds using the benefits of the [[Pure Storm Baptism]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] performed the Baptism on Ziel using [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel of the [[Wasteland]] resides in a house within an unnamed cloud fortress protected by encryption circles, foundational [[scripts]], and protective [[scripts]]. A person whose spirit has been uncomfortable for years, he is a thrice-forged [[soulfire]] practitioner who has undergone the [[Pure Storm Baptism]] and fought a [[Dreadgod]]. While recovering from the suppression field around [[Sacred Valley]], he was sought out by the [[Sect of Twin Stars]], where he holds the title Master of the Training [[Hall]]. During a confrontation in a [[labyrinth]], Ziel utilized a massive [[steel]] hammer driven by [[Forged]] [[scripts]] and emerald runes to conjure force barriers and match against [[Lindon]]'s trident. Although he suffered severe burns across half of his body during combat, he later recovered and questioned [[Eithan]] regarding the path to becoming a [[Sage]] and his reporting requirements to the [[Abidan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel has an unnamed cloud fortress.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel is recovering.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel is a person whose spirit has been uncomfortable for years.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel has undergone the [[Pure Storm Baptism]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel is recovering from the suppression field around [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel fought a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel lives in a house aboard his cloud fortress.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel uses a [[void key]] to store belongings.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel's cloud fortress has foundational [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel added an encryption circle around his cloudbase.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel uses protective [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel has a long-dry heart.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel is sought out by the [[Sect of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel holds the title 'Master of the Training [[Hall]]'.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel is one of the people who entered [[Lindon]]'s room.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel is a character that needs to be caught.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel possesses a [[void key]] and a massive [[steel]] hammer.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel hopped up on discs of [[Forged]] runes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel identified the presence of death [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel's body shines emerald when he uses his hammer.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel is present in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel can scrape runes into blood.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel conjured a force barrier and used a hammer.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel was covered in dark spots on his gray cloak.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel's body is thrice-forged in [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel is using [[scripts]] to seal a tunnel.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel suggests using [[Ruler techniques]] to deal with the death [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel uses a hammer driven by [[Forged]] script.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel matched against [[Lindon]]'s trident.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel was weakly moving against a wall with half his body burned.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel lost consciousness and has burns across the left half of his body.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] attempted to pick up Ziel.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel appeared burned.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel looked down on the trench.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel snored in the hallway.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel asks what [[Lindon]] will name the hammer.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel uses the [[Steel Dragon’s Mountain]] technique.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel uses emerald runes in his techniques.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel is not yet a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel's [[Path]] involves permutations of a single [[Forger technique]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel wears a gray cloak and can fly through the air.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel was present with [[Lindon]], [[Eithan]], [[Yerin]], [[Orthos]], and [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel shrugged regarding the possibility of a [[Monarch]] making people swear to keep their mouths shut.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel was kicking a mound of dirt.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel asked [[Eithan]] how to get to [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel is a character who questions [[Eithan]]'s reporting requirements to the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Ziel stated that they have stared into the abyss and lived to tell the tale.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An [[Archlord]] who formerly led the [[Dawnwing Sect]], Ziel is a companion to [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]]. The son of an advanced [[sacred artist]], he bonded his father's [[Remnant]] and utilizes a massive hammer and silver shield stored within a [[void key]]. During his travels near [[Windfall]], he uses spiritual perception to examine the ground and employs emerald [[scripts]] to surround his limbs and weapons. While working alongside [[Orthos]] to move debris, he utilizes forged [[scripts]] to manipulate momentum or launch himself. Following a flight down a dark hallway, Ziel ends up slumped and buried under the wreckage of [[Shatterspine Castle]] while observing a [[Remnant]]. He eventually assists [[Lindon]] by providing instructions on how to operate an ancient script.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel is nearby [[Windfall]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A buried elixir exists that would increase advancement for anyone on a force Path, perfect for Ziel.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel is able to examine images from different sides.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel holds his hammer upside-down.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel suggested that [[Lindon]] could go get [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel was an [[Archlord]] for years.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel's father was a scriptor and an advanced [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel bonded his father's [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel was the [[Archlord]] of the [[Dawnwing Sect]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel is a companion of [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel is a character who sat on a nearby rock.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel's hammer and shield are kept in a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel used spiritual perception to extend down into the ground.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel works with [[Orthos]] to move debris in a castle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel is an [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel is a character who uses a hammer and green sigils.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel uses a massive silver shield and a hammer.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel uses emerald [[scripts]] to surround his limbs and weapons.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel possesses a spirit that can sense danger.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel can Forge [[scripts]] to launch himself or manipulate momentum.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel's [[madra]] is relatively weak compared to the [[Rune Queen]]'s.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel's [[Path]] is similar to the [[Rune Queen]]'s.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel is associated with a huge blocky hammer.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel fled down a dark hallway.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel is slumped against wreckage in [[Shatterspine Castle]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel is buried under the wreckage of [[Shatterspine Castle]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel is observing the [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel has a spirit that [[Lindon]] can feel.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Ziel is assisting [[Lindon]] by providing instructions on the operation of an ancient script.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After entering a pocket world, the green-horned Ziel joined [[Lindon]]'s group and began resonating with an [[Icon]]. While pushing toward the peak of [[Archlord]], he operated arrays, laid [[scripts]], and used silver and green runes to protect his allies. During a battle against the [[Sage of Calling Storms]], Ziel fought with an empty core and used the Stone Anchor to hold himself together before advancing to become a newly unstable [[Sage]]. Now known as the [[Shield Sage]], he utilizes his defensive [[Path]] and emerald runes to battle through hostile storms and block threats like the [[Weeping Dragon]]. Despite his many scars and a [[jade]] [[Remnant]], he possesses the power of a [[Monarch]] and continues to use various techniques and elixirs as he attempts to advance to [[Herald]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel entered the pocket world.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel has green horns and can peek through the [[Soulforge]] portal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel has begun to resonate with an [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is a member of [[Lindon]]'s group.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is concerned that Ziel may only be following him because he and [[Yerin]] want her to.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel was seated in a cycling position in front of the [[Paths]] of Heaven.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel operated the [[Array]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is pushing toward peak [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is being prepared by [[Lindon]] to take hits from [[Monarchs]] and [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel laid [[scripts]] in the sparring hall.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel steers a [[Grand Oath Array]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is a character who knows of a [[Monarch]] who invented a specific technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel used his [[madra]] to intercept stray lightning bolts for [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel uses silver runes to form a protective bubble.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel had not yet completed his [[Sage]] insight.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel had spoken to [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel possesses [[Archlord treasures]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel can use silver and green runes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is at the peak of his realm and close to [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel can forge runes in a circle around himself.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is a defeated foe of the [[Sage of Calling Storms]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel uses the Stone Anchor and [[force madra]] to hold himself together.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel possesses an [[Archlord revelation]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel can create a massive [[steel]] shield across the sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel's core was entirely empty during the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is fighting in a battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is a newly advanced [[Sage]] with unstable authority and an empty or near-empty core.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel watched [[Yerin]] kill the [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel had left [[Lindon]]'s group a week prior.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel escaped by cutting through the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel has a [[Grand Oath Array]] stowed.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is newly awakened to the [[Shield Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel consumes a recovery elixir.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is on his way to the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is battling through a hostile storm and lightning-dragons.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel used a large [[steel]] shield for defense.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is the [[Shield Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel's [[Path]] is suited for defense.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel used the [[Path of the Dawn Oath]] to spin emerald runes into circles.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel used the [[Enforcer technique]] Stone Anchor to keep his feet.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel feels a furious will from the [[Dreadgod]] and from himself.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel unleashed techniques to block the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel was hovering in the sky hurling techniques into the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel used the [[Oracle Sage]]’s blessing to watch the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel can forge rings of emerald runes using a script.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel felt an arrow crawl to a stop in one of his script-circles.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] shifted her attention to Ziel.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel was in the worst shape among [[Lindon]]'s friends.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel's wounds were a combination of [[Mercy]]'s and [[Yerin]]'s wounds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel had woken up and was waiting for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel burned with passion.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel's [[Broken Crown]] could theoretically be used to create a link.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is a person [[Lindon]] needs to contact.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is focused on his spiritual sense.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is responsible for reinforcing rooms with [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel watched [[Mercy]] with a flat look.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel seemed all right during the fight against shadow swords.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel provided a shield for [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel can stabilize [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is a young [[Sage]] with emerald horns and shaggy hair.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss suggests [[Yerin]] go help Ziel.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is attempting to advance to [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel's Remnant]] is a [[jade]] creature with the head of a snarling monster.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel's Remnant]] has dull green horns and four-fingered hands.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel's Remnant]] is covered in scars from being taken apart and stitched together.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel's Remnant]] radiates the physical pressure of a force Remnant.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel uses a hammer stored in his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel uses the [[Oathsign]] technique to Forge rings.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel's body has been strengthened by elixirs.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel's skin was covered in scars from the [[Remnant]]'s fingers that were filled with a dull [[jade]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel possesses the power of a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel was a [[Truegold]] in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel can forge a circle to focus [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel used techniques that fell like hundreds of hammers.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel refused to go into the portal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is present and speaks with a flat voice.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel asks if [[Eithan]] can help [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is a person whom students in the Training [[Hall]] ask about.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel is a character who can transport himself inside vessels.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel has black, armored boots.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ziel was present during [[Lindon]]'s reunion.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Chosen for his ability to provide long-term solutions to crises, Ziel is a member of the [[Reaper Division]] who possesses the authority of a [[Sage]]. While traveling under a provided cover identity, he utilizes the [[Path of the Dawn Oath]] and employs illusions, veils, runes, and script-circles to channel force. Despite having a limited amount of [[madra]] compared to his true power, the individual who has endured the agony of a ravaged spirit uses makeshift shields and scavenged technology to navigate his missions. During one such journey, he returned home covered in the greenish blood of a split worm from the Void. Throughout his service, Ziel has worked to prevent misconceptions regarding others, such as when [[Yerin]] performed his work to stop people from believing she was a spider goddess.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel is chosen to solve crises with long-term solutions.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel is mentioned as someone who would have protected people while doing what was wanted.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel is a member of the [[Reaper Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel has horns that he can withdraw.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel is traveling with a cover identity provided for his mission.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel is a character who can use illusions.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel has a limited amount of [[madra]] relative to his full power.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel is a character who carries people on his shoulder.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel is a person who has experienced the agony of a ravaged spirit.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel knows that [[Eternity Incorporated]]'s attempts at transcendence will tear the world apart.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel scavenged a piece of technology from local garbage.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel uses a makeshift shield.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel has some authority as a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel uses the [[Path of the Dawn Oath]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel uses a [[veil]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel uses runes and script-circles to channel force.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel is returning home from a mission.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel was covered in greenish blood from a split worm in the Void.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ziel stated that [[Iteration]] names are determined by a committee of [[Ghosts]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] performed Ziel work to prevent people from believing she was a spider goddess.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"Do Remnants form in there?" It was Ziel who answered.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"The only one whose power he hadn’t borrowed was Ziel."<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Which leaves the Kazan for you, Ziel. You think you can handle it?”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"This Dreadgod can eat entire mountains," Ziel said.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Speaking of which, have you seen Ziel?”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
